title: Spicy Chicken Wings
description: A simple recipe for spicy chicken wings, marinated in a mix of Croatian and peppery flavors.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine Croatian paprika, peppercorns, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add olive oil to the blender and blend until you get a smooth paste.
Place the chicken wings in a large bowl and toss them with the spice paste until they are evenly coated.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray. Arrange the chicken wings on the baking sheet.
Bake the chicken wings for 25-30 minutes or until they are cooked through. Serve hot and enjoy!
